case_title: EDGARDO B. DE VERA VS. JOSE LACAP et al

PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY FILIPINO INTERPRETER---DIANA CUDIA. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY FILIPINO INTERPRETER---ROSALIE LACAP. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.
